name: Golden Crumb Broccoli
recipeIngredient: 1 can Condensed cream of mushroom soup
1/4 cup Shredded sharp American cheese (1 ounce)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the broccoli into pieces to make about 6 cups.
2. In a saucepan, cook the broccoli uncovered in a small amount of boiling, salted water for 10 to 15 minutes. Drain well.
3. Transfer the cooked broccoli to a 1 1/2-quart casserole dish.
4. Mix together the condensed cream of mushroom soup, mayonnaise, shredded cheese, chopped pimiento, and lemon juice in a bowl.
5. Pour the mixture over the broccoli in the casserole dish.
6. Sprinkle the crushed crackers on top.
7. Bake uncovered at 350°F for 35 minutes.
